## What

<!-- One paragraph: what does this change, and why? -->

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test:ci && pnpm build` passes
- [ ] Changeset added (`pnpm changeset`) if this touches a published package
- [ ] Docs updated if the public API changed
- [ ] New behaviour is covered by tests
